name: Body Fat Navy Method
description: Free online body fat navy method. Enter waist and neck to get instant results.
seo_title: Body Fat Navy Method – Easy Calculator
seo_description: Use our free body fat navy method to quickly estimate bfp based on waist, neck, height. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate grasa corporal method Navy to hombre with cintura 80cm, cuello 40cm
result_context: The method Navy Use circunferencias corporales; precisión ±3-4% comparado with DEXA as referencia.
steps: Mide cintura a nivel of the ombligo (cm)
Mide cuello justo low The nuez of Adán (cm)
Aplica formula Navy específica per género using logaritmos
Compara with rangos: hombres 8-19% saludable, mujeres 21-33%
mistakes: Measure cintura over ropa or with cinta floja (subestima grasa)
Measure cuello muy abajo (debe ser justo low nuez of Adán)
Apply formula hombre a mujer or viceversa (Use ecuaciones distintas)
desc: Free online body fat navy method. Enter waist and neck to get instant results.
